name: Pasta with Feta and Bitter Greens
recipeIngredient: 8 cups Bitter greens - spinach and escarole
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash, dry, and coarsely chop the bitter greens.
2. In a large skillet or wok, sauté onions for 10 minutes or more until tender.
3. Bring water to boil for pasta.
4. Add chopped greens to the skillet or wok. Cook over medium-high heat for 10 to 15 minutes.
5. While cooking the greens, cook the pasta according to package instructions.
6. When the pasta is ready, drain it.
7. Crumble feta into the greens and stir to make a thick sauce.
8. Stir in the drained pasta.
9. Cook for a few more minutes until warmed through.
10. Serve immediately with freshly ground pepper and grated Parmesan cheese to taste.
